name: Chapter of Love
original_name: รักแรกในเล่มโปรด
overview: The series explores a variety of forms of love and human connection. It delves into different relationships, focusing on themes such as desire, commitment, and intimacy. The plot is driven by the characters' pursuit of love, with the narrative exploring the spectrum from love to hate, complete with secrets, betrayals, and complex emotional dynamics.

trailers.title: OFFICIAL PILOT | รักแรกในเล่มโปรด (CHAPTEROFLOVE)
